rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0001
rows.name: Lao, what are you thinking!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0002
rows.name: You know what that information means to us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0003
rows.name: I know. That's exactly why I took action.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0003_2
rows.name:
I've been waiting for this
day for a long time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0004
rows.name: Tch.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0005
rows.name: Vandham, what happened!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0006
rows.name: It's Lao.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0007
rows.name:
He's taking the data [System:Ruby rt=device ]terminal[/System:Ruby] and
trying to defect to the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0008
rows.name: Lao-san is!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0009
rows.name: Explain yourself, Lao.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0010
rows.name: Elma[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0010_2
rows.name: Your mistake was not letting me die.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0011
rows.name:
You realized it, didn't you?
That I was the Growth spy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0012
rows.name: It can't be![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0013
rows.name:
I suspected it. But... I
didn't want to believe it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0014
rows.name: You're honest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0015
rows.name:
Whatever. While I'm at it, I'll take
this new-model Doll... the Prog Ares.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0016
rows.name: A souvenir for the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0017
rows.name:
Don't give me that crap! If you're leaving,
you get through me one-on-one first, Lao![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0018
rows.name: Like I could beat you bare-handed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0019
rows.name:
Lao! You bastard, what the
hell are you thinking!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0020
rows.name:
One after another... Looks like you
all have too much time on your hands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0021
rows.name: Don't make jokes, Lao![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0022
rows.name:
Stop! There's something we
have to retrieve from him![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0023
rows.name: Damn it[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0024
rows.name: That's how it is. Sorry, Doug.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0025
rows.name:
Did you seriously betray us,
Lao? The enemy is the Growth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0026
rows.name:
Joining hands with walking brains and
dog-like people... Yeah, it's no thrill.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0027
rows.name:
But if our goals line up,
we can work together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0028
rows.name: Goal?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0029
rows.name: Doug, you understand, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0030
rows.name:
I don't understand... and I
don't want to understand![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0031
rows.name: I'm going now. See ya.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs11020100_MSG0032
rows.name: Lao...[ST:wait ]
